name: Crown Logistics
description: Crown Logistics specializes in supply chain management, providing dedicated inventory management services tailored for high-end brands in sectors like fashion, cosmetics, and health products. Their expertise helps clients enhance their business and brand value in the Greater China area.

name: Manhattan Associates
description: Grupo Éxito significantly enhanced their inventory management and fulfillment processes by adopting Manhattan Active Omni, which provides global inventory visibility and real-time order management. This transition not only improved delivery times by 50% but also elevated customer satisfaction through a more streamlined and accurate omnichannel experience.

name: Key Information Technology LLC
description: KIT specializes in IT solutions and offers a range of services, including point of sale solutions that are directly relevant to inventory management. With over 35 years of experience, KIT is well-equipped to support various industries with effective inventory management systems.

name: SupplyPro Inc.
description: SupplyPro is a leading provider of inventory management solutions, offering a range of products and services designed to simplify the distribution and management of various supplies. Their intelligent inventory software and flexible configurations cater to specific requirements, ensuring high ROI and seamless integration with existing systems.

name: Fastenal México
description: Fastenal emphasizes its expertise in inventory management by implementing a comprehensive strategy that includes vendor consolidation, consumption controls, and SKU rationalization. This approach not only reduces expenditures but also enhances local inventory management through technology and dedicated service.

name: INVENTORY S.R.L.
description: Inventory S.r.l. specializes in comprehensive inventory management solutions, offering physical warehouse inventory services and rental of inventory tools and software. Their expertise includes managing asset inventory and point-of-sale inventory, along with consulting to enhance inventory procedures.

name: Inventory Source
description: Inventory Source is a dropship data solution provider that offers tools for optimizing ecommerce operations, including inventory synchronization and automated product uploads. Their focus on maintaining accurate product information allows for efficient management of inventory from multiple suppliers, supporting business growth in the dropshipping sector.

name: ASAP Systems
description: The company offers a comprehensive Inventory System and Asset Tracking Software that enhances efficiency by streamlining processes and reducing manual data entry. Their solution allows organizations to accurately manage inventory levels and provides data-driven forecasts for inventory trends.

name: Procuzy
description: Procuzy is a B2B supply chain management platform that provides software solutions specifically designed for efficient inventory management. Their features include real-time inventory decisions, stock adjustment and transfer, and omnichannel inventory, all aimed at enhancing supply chain operations.

name: Savi Technology
description: Savi Technology enhances inventory management through its Savi Insight™ and Savi Visibility™ solutions, which provide real-time information and predictive analytics for in-transit shipments. Their commitment to innovation and secure tracking technologies ensures that organizations can make informed operational decisions regarding their critical assets.
